name: Cardiac Conduction (QRS Duration)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with normal electrocardiograms for cardiac conduction studies. The phenotype selects subjects without heart disease, interfering medications, or abnormal electrolytes at the time of ECG to study QRS duration.
prompt: Find all patients who have had an electrocardiogram performed with QRS duration measurements, excluding those with diagnosed heart disease, cardiac medications, or electrolyte abnormalities.

required_codes.display: Electrocardiogram, routine ECG with at least 12 leads
